mapper.select: SELECT o.*, t.table_number, u.username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN table_info t ON o.table_id = t.table_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON o.user_id = u.user_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.*, t.table_number, u.username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN table_info t ON o.table_id = t.table_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON o.user_id = u.user_id WHERE o.table_id = #{tableId} AND o.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY o.order_id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT od.*, d.dish_name, od.quantity * od.unit_price AS subtotal FROM order_detail od LEFT JOIN dish d ON od.dish_id = d.dish_id WHERE od.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(total_amount, status, table_id, user_id) VALUES(0.00, #{status}, #{tableId}, #{userId})
INSERT INTO order_detail(order_id, dish_id, quantity, unit_price, remark) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{dishId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE order_detail SET quantity = quantity + #{quantity}, remark = CASE WHEN #{remark} IS NULL OR #{remark} = '' THEN remark WHEN remark IS NULL OR remark = '' THEN #{remark} ELSE CONCAT(remark, '; ', #{remark}) END WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND dish_id = #{dishId}
UPDATE orders SET total_amount = #{totalAmount} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET total_amount = total_amount + #{amount} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'PENDING', paid_amount = 0.00, discount_amount = 0.00, pay_no = NULL, pay_method = NULL WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET reminder_count = reminder_count + 1, last_reminder_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET table_id = #{tableId} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE DATE(order_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayOrders, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(paid_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE DATE(order_time) = CURDATE() AND status IN ('PAID','COMPLETED')) AS todayRevenue, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table_info WHERE status = 'FREE') AS freeTables, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dish WHERE stock <= 10) AS lowStockDishes

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PAID','COMPLETED') THEN paid_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS revenue FROM orders GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12
mapper.update: UPDATE orders o SET o.status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.status = 'PAID' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id AND od.status != 'SERVED' )
mapper.select: SELECT od.order_id AS orderId, od.dish_id AS dishId, d.dish_name AS dishName, od.quantity, od.remark, o.table_id AS tableId, t.table_number AS tableNumber, o.order_time AS orderTime, o.reminder_count AS reminderCount, o.last_reminder_time AS lastReminderTime, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.order_time, NOW()) AS waitMinutes, od.status AS cookingStatus FROM order_detail od JOIN orders o ON od.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dish d ON od.dish_id = d.dish_id JOIN table_info t ON o.table_id = t.table_id WHERE o.status IN ('PENDING','PAID') AND (od.status IS NULL OR od.status != 'SERVED') ORDER BY o.order_time ASC

SELECT d.dish_name AS dishName, c.category_name AS categoryName, SUM(od.quantity) AS sales, SUM(od.quantity * od.unit_price) AS amount FROM order_detail od JOIN orders o ON od.order_id = o.order_id JOIN dish d ON od.dish_id = d.dish_id LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.category_id WHERE o.status IN ('PAID','COMPLETED') AND DATE(o.order_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY d.dish_id, d.dish_name, c.category_name ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT #{limit}
